label: Joy giver
description: Defines an activity that satisfies a pawn's joy need. JobGiver_GetJoy selects among all JoyGiverDefs using baseChance, pctPawnsEverDo, and required capacity checks, then creates the appropriate job via the giverClass worker.

giverClass.label: Giver class
giverClass.description: C# JoyGiver subclass that implements how this activity is started and validated. The Worker property instantiates this type at runtime.

baseChance.label: Base chance
baseChance.description: Relative weight used by JobGiver_GetJoy when rolling across all eligible joy givers. Higher values make this activity more likely to be chosen. Source default is 0; shipped data always sets an explicit value.

requireChair.label: Require chair
requireChair.description: If true, building-interaction workers such as JoyGiver_InteractBuildingSitAdjacent require a chair adjacent to the target thing before assigning the job.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: Things (buildings or items) that workers such as JoyGiver_InteractBuilding, JoyGiver_WatchBuilding, and JoyGiver_Ingest search for when finding a target.

jobDef.label: Job def
jobDef.description: JobDef the worker creates when starting the activity. Optional -- ingestible and drug givers such as TakeDrug and EatChocolate derive the job from the thing rather than from this field.

desireSit.label: Desire sit
desireSit.description: If true, building-interaction workers prefer a seated position adjacent to the target when starting the activity.

pctPawnsEverDo.label: Pct pawns ever do
pctPawnsEverDo.description: Fraction of pawns (0-1) that are eligible to receive this joy activity at all. Acts as a permanent exclusion filter applied before the baseChance roll.

unroofedOnly.label: Unroofed only
unroofedOnly.description: If true, building-interaction workers only consider targets that are not under a roof.

joyKind.label: Joy kind
joyKind.description: JoyKindDef that classifies the type of joy this activity provides. Used by JoyGiver.CanBeGivenTo and cross-checked against jobDef.joyKind in ConfigErrors.

requiredCapacities.label: Required capacities
requiredCapacities.description: Pawn capacities that must not be fully disabled for this giver to be assigned. JoyGiver.CanBeGivenTo rejects pawns lacking any listed capacity.

canDoWhileInBed.label: Can do while in bed
canDoWhileInBed.description: If true, JobGiver_GetJoyInBed can assign this activity to a pawn that is resting in a bed.

requiresEnjoyOutdoors.label: Requires enjoy outdoors
requiresEnjoyOutdoors.description: If true, this activity is restricted to pawns that prefer the outdoors. When genes are active, pawns that avoid sunlight are also excluded.

countsForRecRoom.label: Counts for rec room
countsForRecRoom.description: If true, performing this activity in a room contributes to that room's recreation room role stat.

basic-joy-giver.label: Basic joy giver
basic-joy-giver.description: Minimal joy giver with a worker class, base chance, joy kind, and optional job.

building-joy-giver.label: Building joy giver
building-joy-giver.description: Building or furniture interaction joy giver using a target thing list and an interaction job.

outdoor-joy-giver.label: Outdoor joy giver
outdoor-joy-giver.description: Outdoor activity such as skygazing, walking, snowman building, or swimming.

ingestible-joy-giver.label: Ingestible joy giver
ingestible-joy-giver.description: Food or drug joy giver where jobDef may be absent and the worker derives the job from the ingestible thing.
